title: orthanthera albida
intro: Orthanthera albida, also known as the white starflower, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Orthanthera albida include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
